title: Salón de belleza
writer: José G. Cruz, José Díaz Morales, Fernando A. Rivero
actors: Emilio Tuero, Rita Macedo, Andrea Palma
plot: A neighborhood beauty salon serves as the source of gossip while totally ignoring the old adage which advises people in glass houses not to throw stones. Its clientele, and employees are all caught up in illicit activities like ad...
